scope: Cycle 10: Bug hunt C9 (encounter_card_overlay, screen_dither_layer, merlin_visual) + HUD strip feature

bugs_found.description: BIOME_CRT_PALETTES and BIOME_CRT_PROFILES use shortened keys (broceliande, landes, etc.) but callers pass canonical keys (foret_broceliande, landes_bruyere, etc.). All 8 biomes fell back to the default broceliande palette. Biome-specific CRT coloring was completely non-functional. Also: CRTLayer.set_biome() normalized _current_biome but passed raw biome_key to downstream _animate_biome_transition/_apply_biome_colors.
bugs_found.fix: Added biome_palette_key() static normalizer to MerlinVisual with _BIOME_KEY_ALIAS mapping. Updated 3 lookup sites in MerlinVisual (create_biome_palette_texture, apply_biome_crt, create_kingdom_palette). Added _normalize_biome_key() to CRTLayer, fixed set_biome() to pass normalized key to downstream functions.

overall_assessment: Cycle 10: Major visual bug fixed — biome CRT palettes now correctly applied per-biome instead of always falling back to broceliande green. 26 total bugs fixed across 10 cycles. HUD strip adds critical gameplay info to encounter cards.
